nats_service.md.summary: A Rust code example demonstrating how to implement a NATS service using the async_nats crate, featuring service building, endpoint grouping (min/max), and asynchronous request handling.
nats_service.md.when_to_use: Use this file as a reference when building microservices or request-response systems with NATS in Rust, specifically for learning how to use the Service API.
